How To Set up - Schema & Microdata
Framework Foundations
HOW DO I SET IT UP
You’ll probably (like 97%) need a web developer to help you with this – especially if
you’re not comfortable editing the CMS of your site. Try a find a dev that is ideally
familiar or specializes in SEO – as they will understand Schema.
STEP #1: HEAD TO STRUCTURED DATA
MARKUP HELPER
https://www.google.com/webmasters/markup-helper/?email=true
Once here, click on “Website” and select the category most applicable to you (there
are 10 in total)
STEP #2: ADD IN THE URL IN QUESTION
AND SELECT “START TAGGING”
Need Help?

out to one of the crew inside the
Facebook group. Or sign up for one of
the Q&A calls. We've got your back!
